stemHtml: The aircraft commander, when he has reasonable grounds to believe that a person has committed or is about to commit, on board the aircraft, an offence against penal law…

options.a: may not require or authorise the assistance of other crew members
options.b: may deliver such person to the competent authorities
options.c: may request such person to disembark
options.d: may require the assistance of passengers to restrain such person
